items.title: Conversation practice
items.body:
Answer aloud first. Then complete the exercises.

Examples:
• How do you spell your name?
• 4- Do you want to speak with your boss now?
• 6- Do you want to go to church with me this week?
• 7- What do you like to drink for dinner?

items.text: How do you spell your name?
4- Do you want to speak with your boss now?
6- Do you want to go to church with me this week?

items.prompt: Choose the English sentence for: Eu quero estudar Francês. Eu quero ir ao centro.
options: I want to study French. I want to go downtown.
You want to study French. I want to go downtown.
I want to study French. I want to go downtown 3.
downtown go to want I French study to want I.

items.prompt: Choose the English sentence for: Eu quero trabalhar à noite Eu quero ir para casa.
options: home go to want I night at work to want I.
You want to work at night. I want to go home.
I want to work at night. I want to go home.
I want to work at night. I want to go home 3.

items.prompt: Choose the English sentence for: Como se escreve/soletra seu nome?
options: How do you spell your name? 2.
name? your spell you do How
How do you spell your name? 3.
How do you spell your name?

items.answer: 7- What do you like to drink for dinner?
